suite.name: Praegus Travels

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=lvnl, url=http://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

test.name: Doe een GET request for specific id

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites/844 path_url=/api/campsites/844 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Basic aGVpbnNmOmZMT0JSTy0xMjM='} body=None

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites path_url=/api/campsites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Basic aGVpbnNmOmZMT0JSTy0xMjM='} body=None

GET Response : url=http://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites status=200, reason=OK headers={'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '3600', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'x-requested-with, authorization, content-type', 'Vary': 'Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate', 'Pragma': 'no-cache', 'Expires': '0', 'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Date': 'Wed, 15 Oct 2025 12:55:34 GMT', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked'} body=[{"id":831,"name":"Pine Valley Campground","location":"Yosemite National Park, CA","description":"Beautiful campsite nestled among pine trees with stunning views of the valley. Perfect for families and groups.","pricePerNight":45.0,"capacity":6,"amenities":"Fire pit, Picnic table, Water access, Restrooms nearby","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504280390367-361c6d9f38f4","available":true,"campsiteType":"tent","terrainType":"forest","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":832,"name":"Lakeside Retreat","location":"Lake Tahoe, CA","description":"Peaceful campsite right on the shores of Lake Tahoe. Enjoy swimming, fishing, and beautiful sunsets.","pricePerNight":65.0,"capacity":4,"amenities":"Dock access, Fire ring, Picnic table, Shower facilities","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537905569824-f89f14cceb68","available":true,"campsiteType":"cabin","terrainType":"lake","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":833,"name":"Desert Oasis","location":"Joshua Tree National Park, CA","description":"Experience the magic of the desert at this secluded campsite. Amazing stargazing opportunities.","pricePerNight":35.0,"capacity":8,"amenities":"Shade structure, Fire pit, Vault toilets","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523987355523-c7b5b0dd90a7","available":true,"campsiteType":"tent","terrainType":"desert","accessibilityLevel":"moderate"},{"id":834,"name":"Mountain View","location":"Rocky Mountain National Park, CO","description":"High-altitude campsite with breathtaking views of the Rocky Mountains. Great hiking trails nearby.","pricePerNight":55.0,"capacity":5,"amenities":"Bear boxes, Fire ring, Picnic table, Potable water","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571863533956-01c88e79957e","available":false,"campsiteType":"backcountry","terrainType":"mountain","accessibilityLevel":"difficult"},{"id":835,"name":"Coastal Hideaway","location":"Big Sur, CA","description":"Stunning coastal campsite with ocean views and beach access. Fall asleep to the sound of waves.","pricePerNight":75.0,"capacity":4,"amenities":"Beach access, Fire pit, Picnic table, Hot showers","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1510312305653-8ed496efae75","available":true,"campsiteType":"glamping","terrainType":"beach","accessibilityLevel":"accessible"},{"id":836,"name":"Floris","location":"Gouda","description":"test","pricePerNight":10000.0,"capacity":40,"amenities":"alles","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"best","terrainType":"best","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":837,"name":"Floris","location":"Gouda","description":"test","pricePerNight":10000.0,"capacity":40,"amenities":"alles","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"best","terrainType":"best","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":838,"name":"Floris","location":"Gouda","description":"test","pricePerNight":10000.0,"capacity":40,"amenities":"alles","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"best","terrainType":"best","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":839,"name":"Floris","location":"Gouda","description":"test","pricePerNight":10000.0,"capacity":40,"amenities":"alles","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"best","terrainType":"best","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":840,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""},{"id":841,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""},{"id":842,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""},{"id":843,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""},{"id":844,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""},{"id":845,"name":"LVNL-camping","location":"Schiphol","description":"\"\"","pricePerNight":0.0,"capacity":1,"amenities":"\"\"","imageUrl":null,"available":true,"campsiteType":"\"camping\"","terrainType":"\"Urban\"","accessibilityLevel":"\"hard\""}]

kw.msg: {'id': 831, 'name': 'Pine Valley Campground', 'location': 'Yosemite National Park, CA', 'description': 'Beautiful campsite nestled among pine trees with stunning views of the valley. Perfect for families and groups.', 'pricePerNight': 45.0, 'capacity': 6, 'amenities': 'Fire pit, Picnic table, Water access, Restrooms nearby', 'imageUrl': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504280390367-361c6d9f38f4', 'available': True, 'campsiteType': 'tent', 'terrainType': 'forest', 'accessibilityLevel': 'easy'} is de eerstgevonden campsite

test.name: POST om campsite toe te voegen

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
kw.msg: &{payload} = { name=LVNL-camping | location=Schiphol | description="" | pricePerNight=0 | capacity=1 | amenities="" | campsiteType="camping" | terrainType="Urban" | accessibilityLevel="hard" }

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites path_url=/api/campsites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '224', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Basic aGVpbnNmOmZMT0JSTy0xMjM='} body=b'{"name": "LVNL-camping", "location": "Schiphol", "description": "\\"\\"", "pricePerNight": "0", "capacity": "1", "amenities": "\\"\\"", "campsiteType": "\\"camping\\"", "terrainType": "\\"Urban\\"", "accessibilityLevel": "\\"hard\\""}'

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: API definition can be found here: https://travels.praegus.nl/swagger-ui/index.html
